stemHtml: How is "Solo flight time" defined in Part FCL?

options.a: Flight time during which the student pilot is the sole manipulator of the flight controls from start-up to shut-down.
options.b: The student acting a pilot in command on a flight when the instructor is just observing.
options.c: Flight time during which a student pilot is the sole occupant of an aircraft.
options.d: That time when the pilot is acting in command of the aircraft.
